intro: Bats in your Hewlett home or business require immediate professional attention for safe, humane removal and permanent exclusion. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in comprehensive bat removal services throughout Hewlett and the Five Towns area, protecting your property from these protected yet problematic wildlife intruders. Our certified technicians use proven exclusion methods to remove bats and prevent their return to your attic, chimney, or walls.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of bat removal expertise to Hewlett residents, combining humane wildlife practices with effective long-term exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand New York State bat protection laws and use only legal, ethical methods while ensuring your home remains bat-free year-round.
localContext: Hewlett's mix of historic homes along Hewlett Neck and larger estates near the waterfront provides numerous entry points where bats commonly roost in attics, soffits, and chimneys. The tree-lined streets near Hewlett Harbor and proximity to parks create ideal bat habitats, making professional exclusion essential for preventing recurring infestations in this peaceful Nassau County community.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Hewlett typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, with pricing that reflects the complexity of your specific bat situation.

faqs.question: Are bats common in Hewlett homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, bats are relatively common in Hewlett due to the abundance of mature trees, proximity to water near Hewlett Harbor, and older homes with accessible attic spaces and roof gaps. Little brown bats and big brown bats frequently seek shelter in residential attics, especially during maternity season from May through August.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New York?
faqs.answer: Bat removal in New York is legal when performed by licensed professionals following state wildlife regulations. Bats cannot be harmed or removed during maternity season (roughly June 1 through July 31), and exclusion must use one-way devices that allow bats to leave but not return. We ensure all work complies with DEC guidelines.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Complete bat exclusion in Hewlett typically takes 2-4 weeks from initial inspection to final sealing. We install one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to exit naturally over 3-7 days, then return to seal all entry points permanently. The timeline may extend during maternity season when exclusion work must be delayed to protect flightless pups.
